channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Table legs dumped on pavement, 28th June
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stannard Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest bike, 28th June
item.description:
Abandoned Forest bike outside 21 Blackbrook Lane Bromley BR2 8AU - was on the floor outside NUmber 19 and has been moved to outside number 21 to be propped up against a tree
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping - new dumping 28 June, 28th June
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colomb Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrowing foliage hiding parking sogn, 28th June
item.description:
There are parking restrictions on this stretch of road but the road sign cannot be seen due to the overgrowing foliage from the garden of 1 Doggetts Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookhill Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 28th June
item.description:
Dead baby fox in the path by bi s
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrowing foliage on Brookhill Road, 28th June
item.description:
Makes footpath hard to pass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookhill Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every bin on the Green is overflowing with litter all over the grass too., 28th June
item.description:
There’s litter all over the green and every bin is overflowing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown foliage on corner of Cat Hill and Brookhill Road, 28th June
item.description:
Thorny bushes and huge amounts of overgrowth

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookhill Road, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden Waste and Other Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 28th June
item.description:
Bags of garden waste and other rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement by the CCTV post. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ann Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Path, 28th June
item.description:
A pile of broken furniture has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maxey Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Mattress Dumped on Pavement, 28th June
item.description:
An unwanted mattress has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich New Road, Woolwich

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped by Parking Meter, 28th June
item.description:
Broken furniture has been left dumped by the parking meter. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parry Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing road sign, 28th June
item.description:
There used to be a road sign on both sides of the entrance to Doggetts Close. The one on the left hand side (what3words ///allow.gets.afford) was removed when 44a Brookhill Road was built and has not been replaced.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Doggetts Close, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Mattress Dumped by Pavement, 28th June
item.description:
An unwanted mattress has been left dumped by the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Parry Place, Woolwich

item.title: Unwanted Door Dumped in Raised Planter, 28th June
item.description:
An unwanted door has been left dumped in the raised planter. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Robert Street, Plumstead

item.title: Rubbish Dumped on Turfed Area, 28th June
item.description:

item.title: Large Unwanted Sofa Dumped on Pavement, 28th June
item.description:

item.title: Bags of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 28th June
item.description:
Several bags of rubbish have been left dumped on the path, and are attracting flies. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead

item.title: Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Path, 28th June
item.description:
